chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5640 of 2018 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.24415/2018 2.For hearing of main case. 30.05.2025 Mr.Zain A. Jatoi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Abdul Nabi Soomro, Additional Commissioner Inland Revenue is present. Mr.Muhammad Fahad Pirzada, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent, which is taken on record. On the last date following order was passed:- “23.05.2025 Mr. Zain A. Jatoi, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&3. Learned counsel presses this petition to the extent that the applications made before the concerned respondent may be decided. He states that pending applications have been placed on record from pages 17 to 21. To such extent, issue notice to the respondents as well as learned DAG for 30.05.2025. The respondent department is directed to depute an officer conversant herewith to appear and assist the Court on the next date.” The officer and learned counsel for the respondent state that the aforementioned applications shall be decided expeditiously preferably within a period of 30 days after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly.
In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
